system.description: Create a new neural pathway. Reach into a brain and roll [quality].
system.synopsis: Create a logical connection in a target's mind

outcomes.success: you create a connection between any two things in the target’s mind. Connections are typically "if, then" statements. (“If I feel cold, then I cook linguine,” “If someone punches left, then I dodge left, into the punch.” etc.)
outcomes.every3rd3:
choose one:
  • Create an additional connection
  • Add the same connection in another target’s mind
outcomes.failure: an assortment of random things in their mind become highly associated with you. This can have unpredictable effects; their opinion of you and the associations might mean they become obsessed, or hateful, or scared. It is permanent.
